title: Avoid setting @NonNull values to null
description: Fields, parameters and return values marked @NotNull, @NonNull, or @Nonnull are assumed to have non-null values and are not typically null-checked before use. Therefore setting one of these values to null, or failing to set such a class field in a constructor, could cause NullPointerExceptions at runtime.
recommendation: Ensure @NonNull values are never set to null

checks.message: @NonNull annotation detected - ensure no null assignments
Null assignment detected - check for NonNull violations
Null value assignment found - potential NonNull violation
